overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a narrow path through a marshy wetland at night. The character traverses wooden boardwalks and dirt trails surrounded by tall grass, passing a wooden cabin and weathered fences under a dark, cloudy sky.

events.description: wooden plank path transitions to dirt trail as the terrain becomes less marshy

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk through tall grass, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: weathered wooden boardwalk elevated above marsh water
tall green reeds and grass growing in wetland on both sides of path
trees with white blossoms visible on the left side of the marsh
dark silhouette of forest trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a weathered wooden boardwalk cutting through dense marsh wetlands at night. Tall grass and reeds flank both sides of the elevated path, while flowering trees with white blossoms stand out against the dark landscape on the left. The sky is overcast and dark, with minimal ambient light illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path approaching rural wooden cabin

events.description: wooden cabin with thatched roof becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the dirt trail, approaching and passing a wooden cabin on the right

entered.detail: small rustic wooden house with thatched roof and stone foundation
narrow dirt path replacing the wooden boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from wooden planks to dirt as Geralt walks through the marsh. A rustic wooden cabin with a thatched roof appears on the right side of the path, which Geralt approaches and passes. The tall marsh grass continues to line both sides of the trail, and the flowering trees remain visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with wooden fencing

events.description: weathered wooden fence appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt trail with wooden fence now lining the right side

entered.detail: weathered wooden post fence running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed the cabin, Geralt continues along the dirt trail which is now bordered by a weathered wooden fence on the right. The marsh grass remains dense on both sides, and the path curves gently through the wetland landscape. The wooden fence posts appear aged and moss-covered.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: stone wall ruins appear on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past stone ruins on the left while the wooden fence continues on the right

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall ruins covered in moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, Geralt passes ancient stone wall ruins on the left side of the path, covered in moss and overgrown with vegetation. The wooden fence continues on the right but recedes into the distance. The trail remains a narrow dirt path through the marsh, with the dark forest silhouette still visible ahead under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, marshy wetland that transitions from a structured boardwalk into a rugged trail of ruins. It begins with Geralt traversing a weathered wooden boardwalk flanked by dense reeds and white flowering trees under a heavy, overcast night sky. As the wooden planks give way to a dirt path, the camera passes a rustic thatched-roof cabin on the right while the surrounding marsh grass remains thick. The scene then shifts as the trail curves, replacing the open marsh edge with a moss-covered wooden fence that guides the way forward. Finally, the path leads past ancient, vegetation-overgrown stone ruins on the left before heading toward the dark silhouette of a distant forest.
